title: Best paper trading platform for crypto and equities?
author: sodeypunk
selftext: I’m looking to automate and test several different Ai strategies and need multiple paper trading accounts. I am currently using Alpaca but they have some limitations. Supports only 3 paper accounts, no stop loss and trailing stop options on Crypto and somewhat illiquid. Has anyone here had success with other platforms?

comments.author: Patient_Kangaroo4864
comments.body: IBKR paper is fine for equities and options, crypto’s thin but stops work and you don’t hit the 3-account wall. For multi-strat automation QuantConnect’s cleaner since projects are isolated and paper/live are the same, with crypto via Coinbase/Binance and equities via IBKR.

comments.author: jabberw0ckee
comments.body:
Try Stockkit.ai

It only trades Stockkit alerts. In beta, but if you could try it out, let me know.
